author: Fuming
name: Recurrent TRM 9x3 + per-pass LoRA
blurb: 9 physical transformer blocks looped 3 times (27 effective layers) with shared weights and per-pass low-rank Q/V adapters (LoRA rank 4). GQA (8Q/4KV heads), tied embeddings, logit softcap, RoPE, Muon for backbone 2D weights, Adam for LoRA/scalars. Weight sharing across recurrences reduces parameter count; LoRA lets each pass specialize attention without duplicating full matrices.
notes: val_loss, val_bpb, bytes_total, bytes_code to be filled from the final_int8_zlib_roundtrip lines in the training log after the H100 run.
